# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This is a **Drift workspace** — an isolated sandbox created by `drift prepare`.

## What is a Drift workspace?

One or more source projects have been copied here with all git history stripped. This
repository is a clean, single-origin git repo intended for AI-assisted development.
There are no remotes. You can commit freely without affecting any upstream project.

## Working in this workspace

- Each top-level subdirectory (other than `.github/`) is a copied source project.
- Treat them as one unified codebase for the purposes of this session.
- Do not add git remotes or push to external repositories.
- Feel free to refactor across project boundaries when it helps.
